Interface SimulationAgent

All Known Implementing Classes:
Administration, Bank, Community, Crowd, EarthEcosource, Factory, Family, Family, Group, Group, Holding, Human, HumanGroup, Individual, Nation, Organization, Person, PoliticalParty, Population, SimulationEntity, SocialCollective, SocialEntity, Society, Tribe
public interface SimulationAgent
Interface for any object that can receive and process simulation events. Allows both inheritance (SimulationEntity) and composition (Population/Individual) patterns to be used in the engine.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getSimId()
    Returns the unique identifier of the agent in the simulation.
    void
    processEvent(Event event)
    Process an event delivered to this agent.

    • processEvent

      void processEvent(Event event)
      Process an event delivered to this agent.
